positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for istanbul_plates_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u18,axiom,
    joe_plate != tom_plate).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define begins_with_35(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define begins_with_34(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define from_istanbul(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define plate(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for istanbul_plates_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~begins_with_34(tom_plate)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~begins_with_35(X0) | ~begins_with_34(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    begins_with_35(tom_plate)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    begins_with_34(joe_plate)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    joe_plate != tom_plate).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define from_istanbul(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define plate(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
